skills.name: Executive & C-Level Support
skills.description: Providing high-level administrative support to C-suite executives including complex calendar management, meeting preparation, travel coordination, and acting as a communication bridge between leadership and the organization. Requires discretion, business acumen, and the ability to anticipate needs.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Manages basic scheduling, books travel, handles routine correspondence, and supports one executive with straightforward calendar needs.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages complex multi-stakeholder calendars across time zones, prepares board and leadership meeting materials, prioritizes competing demands, and proactively resolves scheduling conflicts.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Acts as a strategic partner to the CEO or C-suite, translates business priorities into time-management strategies, manages executive communications, leads ad-hoc strategic projects, and mentors other administrative staff.

skills.name: Office Operations & Facilities Management
skills.description: Managing the day-to-day operations of a physical office environment including facilities maintenance, supply management, front desk operations, vendor coordination, and ensuring a productive, well-functioning workspace.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Handles basic office logistics: ordering supplies, managing deliveries, welcoming visitors, and coordinating with cleaning and catering vendors.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Oversees full office operations including facilities maintenance, vendor management, office layout planning, budget tracking, and proactive problem resolution across multiple service areas.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and scales office operations for multi-site or global organizations, builds operational playbooks, manages complex facility projects (moves, expansions), and drives automation of administrative workflows.

skills.name: Employee Experience & Welfare Programs
skills.description: Designing and executing employee engagement, well-being, and welfare initiatives including company events, celebrations, team-building activities, onboarding experiences, and swag programs. Drives workplace culture and employee satisfaction.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Supports existing employee experience programs, coordinates logistics for events and celebrations, and assists with onboarding welcome kits.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Owns and executes annual welfare programs, plans and produces company events and team-building activities, manages welfare budgets, and measures employee engagement impact.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs global employee experience strategy, leads large-scale conferences and company-wide programs, partners with leadership to align culture initiatives with business goals, and builds scalable engagement frameworks.

skills.name: Vendor Management & Procurement
skills.description: Managing end-to-end procurement processes including vendor sourcing, contract negotiation, purchase order management, supplier relationship management, and cost optimization. Ensures compliance with procurement policies and drives savings.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Processes purchase orders, manages basic vendor relationships, tracks deliveries, and maintains procurement records in ERP systems.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads vendor negotiations, manages RFQ processes, evaluates supplier performance, drives cost-reduction initiatives, and ensures procurement policy compliance across departments.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs procurement strategy for global organizations, builds vendor governance frameworks, leads complex multi-stakeholder contract negotiations, implements procurement automation, and drives strategic sourcing programs.

skills.name: Travel & Logistics Coordination
skills.description: Coordinating domestic and international travel arrangements including flights, accommodation, ground transportation, and expense management. Manages travel policies, vendor relationships, and ensures seamless logistics for employees, executives, and visitors.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Books flights and hotels, coordinates basic travel itineraries, and processes travel expense reports.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages complex multi-destination and international travel for executives and teams, negotiates with travel vendors, maintains travel policies, and handles visa and logistics coordination across time zones.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and manages global travel programs, implements travel management systems, optimizes travel spend across the organization, and builds scalable travel policies for international expansion.

skills.name: Administrative Operations & Process Management
skills.description: Managing administrative workflows, internal processes, data management, and reporting. Includes order processing, document management, internal system coordination, and ensuring operational accuracy and efficiency across business functions.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Handles data entry, document management, basic reporting, and follows established administrative procedures accurately.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages cross-functional administrative processes, produces operational reports, maintains internal systems, coordinates across departments, and identifies process improvement opportunities.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and implements scalable administrative workflows, builds automation for repetitive processes, manages complex multi-system operations, and drives organizational efficiency programs.

skills.name: Facilities Infrastructure & Building Systems
skills.description: Managing physical building infrastructure including electrical systems, HVAC, water, backup power (UPS/generators), low-voltage systems, and Data Center environments. Ensures reliability, availability, safety compliance, and preventive maintenance of critical building systems.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Understands basic building systems, performs routine inspections, reports issues, and coordinates with maintenance vendors for repairs.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages preventive maintenance programs, oversees critical building systems (HVAC, electrical, generators), coordinates with subcontractors, and ensures regulatory compliance and safety standards.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs facility infrastructure strategy, manages complex building systems including Data Centers, leads major construction and renovation projects, implements building management systems (BMS), and ensures business continuity across multiple sites.

skills.name: Budget Management & Cost Control
skills.description: Planning, tracking, and controlling budgets for office operations, facilities, procurement, and G&A functions. Includes expense management, cost-reduction initiatives, vendor cost optimization, and financial reporting to leadership.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Tracks expenses against budget, processes invoices, and maintains basic financial records for office and operational costs.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages departmental budgets, identifies cost-saving opportunities, negotiates vendor pricing, produces financial reports, and ensures spending aligns with organizational goals.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs and manages G&A budgets across global operations, leads strategic cost-optimization programs, builds financial forecasting models for operational planning, and reports to executive leadership on budget performance.

skills.name: Employee Onboarding & Offboarding Operations
skills.description: Managing the operational aspects of employee onboarding and offboarding including workspace setup, equipment provisioning, welcome logistics, access coordination, and ensuring a smooth employee lifecycle from day one through departure.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Prepares workspaces for new hires, coordinates equipment delivery, assembles welcome kits, and follows established onboarding checklists.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Owns end-to-end onboarding/offboarding processes, partners with HR and IT for access provisioning, designs onboarding experiences, and ensures consistency across locations.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs scalable global onboarding programs, automates lifecycle workflows across HR and IT systems, builds metrics for onboarding effectiveness, and drives continuous improvement of the employee journey.

skills.name: Global Operations & Employment Compliance
skills.description: Managing operational processes across multiple countries including payroll coordination, benefits administration, employment law compliance, EOR management, and cross-border team operations. Ensures consistency and legal compliance across jurisdictions.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Supports single-country operations, assists with payroll coordination, and maintains basic employment records.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Manages multi-country operations including payroll, EOR relationships, benefits, and local compliance requirements. Coordinates with legal and finance across jurisdictions.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Designs global operational infrastructure, manages multi-entity employment frameworks, leads international expansion setup, oversees equity administration, and ensures compliance across all jurisdictions.

skills.name: Contract Negotiation & Commercial Management
skills.description: Negotiating commercial terms, pricing, and SLAs with vendors and suppliers. Includes managing contract lifecycle, ensuring favorable terms, minimizing contractual risks, and collaborating with Legal teams on agreement review and execution.

proficiency_levels.beginner: Reviews basic contracts, understands key commercial terms, and supports negotiation processes under guidance.
proficiency_levels.intermediate: Leads vendor negotiations independently, secures favorable pricing and SLAs, manages contract renewals, and coordinates with Legal on agreement review.
proficiency_levels.advanced: Manages complex, high-value global contract negotiations, designs commercial frameworks, drives strategic vendor partnerships, and minimizes organizational risk through contract optimization.
